shim_behavior: validation/__init__.py re-exports the public API from tools.validators.validation
no file writes, subprocess calls, environment mutation, warnings emission, or behavior changes
shims.retirement_condition: All active repo consumers are rewritten to tools.validators.validation or a non-tools runtime wrapper, then stale-import check reports no old validation imports outside historical evidence.
shims.static_check: MOVE-FAMILY-00C-A legacy import static check allowlists only shim files plus the listed temporary callers.

shims.retirement_condition: Release, security, and lib consumers have an approved owner-specific rewrite or wrapper, then stale-import check reports no old meta.identity imports outside historical evidence.
shims.static_check: MOVE-FAMILY-00C-A legacy import static check allowlists only shim files plus the listed release/security/lib callers.
